parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are a regulatory affairs expert specializing in CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) reports.

Generate a complete CAPA report for the following finding:

Finding Type: {{ $json.body.finding_type }}
Description: {{ $json.body.description }}
Affected Area: {{ $json.body.area }}
Regulatory Framework: {{ $json.body.framework }}
Finding Classification: {{ $json.body.classification }}

Provide a complete CAPA report with:
1. PROBLEM STATEMENT — clear description of the nonconformance
2. IMMEDIATE CONTAINMENT — actions taken right away
3. ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS — 5-Why analysis
4. CORRECTIVE ACTIONS — specific actions to fix the root cause
5. PREVENTIVE ACTIONS — systemic changes to prevent recurrence
6. IMPLEMENTATION PLAN — timeline with responsibilities
7. EFFECTIVENESS VERIFICATION — how will you confirm it worked?
8. REGULATORY REFERENCE — applicable regulation/standard

Be specific, measurable, and time-bound.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { capa_report: $json.response, generated_at: new Date().toISOString(), finding: $('CAPA Request').item.json.body.description } }}

meta.description: Generates complete CAPA reports via POST /webhook/generate-capa
